name: gecko-yield-verdict
title: Gecko Yield Verdict
description: The grounded "should I deposit into this pool?" verdict layer for OKX DeFi. Pulls live pool data — APY, TVL, pair, historical rate and TVL trend — from onchainOS / OKX TradeKit, then runs a 7-voice adversarial panel that returns an act / pass / defer verdict with confidence, one surviving dissent line, and investor-canon citations (Howard Marks, Aswath Damodaran, Berkshire letters). Its defining behavior: the panel ABSTAINS rather than fabricating a number when the corpus has no basis — honest grounding over a confident guess. Runs upstream of okx-defi-invest as the neutral "should I?" before the "do it", and never auto-executes. Includes a baseline mode (onchainOS data plus a transparent in-skill heuristic, no panel) so the with-and-without-Gecko decision delta is measurable on the same skill.
